response.justification: Candidate is an accomplished full-stack software engineer with strong web, mobile, and some embedded experience, but the role demands deep expertise in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware, GPU architecture, and hardware-software co-design — areas absent from the resume. Past work at National Instruments and on robotic arms shows some low-level C/C++ exposure, but nothing approaching principal-level hardware performance architecture for AI accelerators.
strengths: Long software engineering career with C/C++ and low-latency systems exposure (Sociomantic, National Instruments)
Some embedded/hardware-adjacent work (robotic arms, wave field synthesis bachelor thesis)
Strong engineering fundamentals: TDD, performance-sensitive systems, multi-language fluency
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator, or GPU architecture experience
No deep neural network training/inference optimization or SIMD/MIMD architecture background
Educational/experience profile is web/full-stack focused, not hardware performance architecture

key_factors.factor: Missing AI accelerator / SoC modeling expertise
No GPU architecture or DNN optimization background
